content.en:
Ye Tian didn't need to look to know that there was definitely an incomparably powerful existence here.

Even the entire land of Eternity is not comparable to such a city, and there are many, many strong people here.

Ye Tian was very low-key, followed Tunxi honestly, and soon came to a certain area of this ancient giant city and settled here.

"During this time, you live here, and after a while, you follow me to a place. "

After Tun Xi finished speaking, he left, and he was not afraid that Ye Tian would escape.

After all, she thought that Ye Tian was controlled, so naturally she couldn't escape.

Besides, the Red Skull Giant Clan is a slave clan here, and they can't escape no matter how they escape.

"My identity may be revealed at any time, I must learn about the information here as soon as possible, and then change my identity!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Thereupon.

He began to learn about the situation in the ancient giant city and seek information.

But I have to say that the status of the Red Skull Giant is really low, and he can't even go to many places.

However, there are also some places where races of status such as the Red Skull Giant can go, and you can also learn some information.

Gradually, he got to know a little bit about it.

First of all.

This ancient giant city, called Fengyu City, is one of the most important cities of the Reincarnation Celestial Clan, and the Reincarnation Celestial Clan is the most noble race in this area, and it is also the only upper clan.

In addition to the Reincarnation Celestial Clan, there are also some slave races that are attached to the Reincarnation Celestial Clan and have no status to speak of.

For example, the Red Skull Giant Clan is one of them, and even the weakest Reincarnation Celestial Clan has a status far superior to the most powerful Red Skull Giant.

Of course.

The reincarnation of the Heavenly Clan does not have weak clansmen.

The newly born Reincarnation Heavenly Clan has a strength comparable to that of the Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor, and when he becomes an adult, he is comparable to the Overlord of the Origin Upper Realm.

It is said that the Reincarnation Heavenly Ancestor has an Origin Upper Realm Overlord comparable to the Nine Awakenings.

And a slave race like the Red Skull Giant, the cultivation path is incomplete, and the Reincarnation Heavenly Ancestor also strictly controls resources, and many Origin Upper Realm overlords like the Red Skull Giant, at most once or twice awakened, they will not be able to continue to improve their strength.

There are very few slaves who want to awaken more than four times, after all, the secret elixirs given are all seriously flawed, that is, it is easier to become the overlord of the Origin Upper Realm than on the other side of the Eternal Land, but if you continue to improve, the difficulty is not as good as that on the Eternal Land.

In a word.

A race like the Red Skull Giant has an extremely miserable life here.

Now.

Ye Tian somewhat understood why the Tai'er Cursed Dragon Clan wanted to stay in the land of the Swinging Sea, I was afraid that it was also a slave race here, and it had no status, and it might even be used as a mount.

However, there are still some of the cursed dragons who remain here as slaves, perhaps because of other secrets, and they cannot all be relocated to the land of the sea.

"It stands to reason that the Reincarnation Heavenly Ancestor here can also invade the land of eternity, why hasn't he invaded?"

Ye Tian was puzzled.

Of course.

The specific reason, he is certainly not qualified to know now.

Other than that.

He also knew that the reincarnation Heavenly Ancestor was not the three paths of the land of eternity at all, and it could even be said that it didn't matter at all.

The Reincarnation Heavenly Clan is following the path of its own bloodline, their bloodline is too strong, and if they awaken their bloodline a little, their strength will skyrocket, which is equivalent to the awakening of the Origin Ancestor Body on the other side of the Origin Upper Realm Overlord.

Suddenly.

Ye Tian thought of his reincarnation Haotian body, which seemed to have something to do with the reincarnation celestial clan.

"Could it be that the original Origin Ancestor created the body of Reincarnation Haotian according to the body of the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan, and according to the awakening of the bloodline of the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan, he created the awakening path of the Origin Ancestor on the other side, that is, the first path?"

Ye Tian said darkly.

It's a real possibility!

Before, he thought that the Origin Ancestor was extremely against the sky, and created three Origin Upper Realm Overlord Paths out of thin air.

But if it's imitation, the difficulty is not too unheavenly.

Another period of time passed.

Ye Tian had obtained some inheritance of the Origin Ancestral Body Method and the Awakening Path on the other side that were suitable for the cultivation of the Red Skull Giant in this Phoenix Feather City, which seemed to be somewhat similar to the land of the Eternal Shore, but it was simpler and more incomplete.

"The inheritance here should come from the land of eternity, but the reincarnation heavenly clan doesn't want these slave races to grow up, so they only give a broken inheritance, so that they can cultivate a few Origin Upper Realm overlords, but they can't threaten their rule!"

Ye Tian guessed that this was the reason.

"The Red Skull Giant has no future, so you still have to make a reincarnation Celestial Clan copy body!"

But the reincarnation celestial race is an intelligent race, if you don't understand each other, you can rashly copy a copy body, and it will be easy to expose.

Therefore, the goal must be chosen well.

After some inquiry, Ye Tian knew that there was a reincarnation celestial clan in Fengyu City who had no sense of existence-Ao Chen!

Ao Chen is very waste, his bloodline is even a little weak, far below the average, he is an adult, he has not yet reached the realm of the Origin Upper Realm Overlord, he usually stays in his own residence, does not go out, and does not interact with other people.

In addition, Ao Chen's parents have fallen, and they are very marginalized among the reincarnation celestial clan.

It can be said that this is a waste material, but it is in line with Ye Tian's goal.

"Just choose this Ao Chen, kill him, copy his copy body, and replace his identity, others don't know about him, and they can't see through my identity. "

Ye Tian muttered.

And so this day.

On the pretext of doing things for Tunxi, Ye Tian entered the residential area of the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan and came to Ao Chen's mansion.

Ao Chen is a complete waste material, Tunxi's status in the clan is not low, he thought that Tunxi was looking for him, so naturally he didn't dare not let Ye Tian in.

Deep in the Dust Mansion.

"What did Tunxi ask you to come to me for?"

Aochen asked.

Ye Tian hurriedly said: "Swallow Xi and let you die!"

As soon as the words fell, Ye Tian shot directly.

Although his replica body is just a replica of the Red Skull Giant, it has no combat power.

However, his own realm is too high, and if he casts a powerful supreme technique on the other side, he can instantly kill Ao Chen, who has not yet reached the realm of the overlord of the Origin Upper Realm.

Airplanes!

Under one blow, Ao Chen was directly killed in seconds.

And Ao Chen couldn't believe that a mere red skeleton giant dared to kill him until he died.

After killing O Chen, he immediately began to copy O Chen's copy body.

Soon.

Aochen's body was copied.

"That's it, then walk in the reincarnation celestial clan as Ao Chen, there will definitely be a big harvest!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Subsequently.

He let his Red Skull Giant copy body and leave here, and then found an appropriate time to offend a powerful reincarnation celestial clan, and was directly killed by the other party.

In this way, the copy body of this red skeleton giant will also dissipate, and it will not be suspicious, and it will not involve its own Ao Chen's copy body.
